name: move_version_4
notes: Hold-to-move ESP32 stepper firmware: W/FWD corrected for current wiring, S/BACK corrected, release sends MOVE STOP, MOVE PING keepalive.

name: KEYDOWN KEYUP SIMPLE KEEPALIVE
notes: Simpler MOVE firmware: keydown/keyup support, MOVE PING keepalive, 300ms auto-stop, PING auto-connect. MOVE PING is handled before generic MOVE commands.

name: 30KG 1-8 MICROSTEP S-CURVE DIAGONAL
notes: 30kg tuned MOVE firmware: 1/8 microstepping, 1200 accel/decel steps, keepalive, diagonals, command queue, PING auto-connect.

name: KEYDOWN KEEPALIVE - MOVE PING auto-stop
notes: Dashboard keydown starts movement, sends MOVE PING every 100ms, keyup sends MOVE STOP. Firmware auto-stops after 300ms without ping.

name: RESTORED - MOVE TMC stepper + dashboard commands
